case_title: SAUNDRA MONROE VS. RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MONROE, SAUNDRA AS TO DEFENDANT RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS, HITESH JADAV) JADAV, HITESH AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-10-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MONROE, SAUNDRA

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 70.00 - SERVED FEB-02-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS, HITESH JADAV)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED FEB-13-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JADAV, HITESH AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS, HITESH JADAV)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT RAPID CASH CLOSING, LLC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH HITESH JADAV (TITLE: MEMBER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2015 - CONTINUED BY ORDER OF THE COURT TO APR-02-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTS (RAPID CASH CLOSING, LLC AND HITESH JADEV) WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT, RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH HITESH JADAV (TITLE: MEMBER).

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE DEFENDANTS (RAPID CASH CLOSING, LLC AND HITESH JADEV) WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT, RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH HITESH JADAV (TITLE: MEMBER). NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFF. THE DEFENDANTS (RAPID CASH CLOSING, LLC AND HITESH JADEV) WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT, RAPID CASH CLOSING LLC WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH HITESH JADAV (TITLE: MEMBER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT ON THE RECORD, D506
